cards.title: SWE (SME L0)
cards.template:
from zoomy_core.model.models.sme_model import SMEInviscid
import zoomy_core.model.boundary_conditions as BC
import zoomy_core.model.initial_conditions as IC
import numpy as np

model = SMEInviscid(level=0)
cards.description:
Shallow water equations (depth-averaged, inviscid).
$$\partial_t \begin{pmatrix} h \\ hu \end{pmatrix} + \nabla \cdot \mathbf{F}(\mathbf{Q}) + \mathbf{B}\nabla\mathbf{Q} = 0$$

cards.title: SME L1
cards.template:
from zoomy_core.model.models.sme_model import SMEInviscid

model = SMEInviscid(level=1)
cards.description:
Shallow Moment Equations level 1 — vertical velocity profile.
$$\partial_t \mathbf{Q} + \nabla \cdot \mathbf{F}(\mathbf{Q}) + \mathbf{B}(\mathbf{Q})\nabla\mathbf{Q} = \mathbf{S}(\mathbf{Q})$$

cards.title: SME L2
cards.template:
from zoomy_core.model.models.sme_model import SMEInviscid

model = SMEInviscid(level=2)
cards.description: Shallow Moment Equations level 2 — higher-order vertical profile.

cards.title: SME (Newtonian)
cards.template:
from zoomy_core.model.models.sme_model import SMEModel

model = SMEModel(level=1)
cards.description: Shallow Moment Equations with Newtonian viscosity and Navier slip.

cards.title: VAM
cards.template:
from zoomy_core.model.models.vam_model import VAMModel

model = VAMModel(level=1, eigenvalue_mode='numerical')
cards.description: Viscous Alignment Model — non-hydrostatic shallow moments with vertical velocity.

cards.title: Scalar Advection
cards.template:
from zoomy_core.model.models.advection_model import ScalarAdvection
import numpy as np

model = ScalarAdvection(dimension=1)
model.parameter_values = np.array([1.0])
cards.description:
Linear scalar advection.
$$\partial_t u + a \partial_x u = 0$$

cards.title: Advection-Diffusion
cards.template:
from zoomy_core.model.models.advection_model import ScalarAdvectionDiffusion
import numpy as np

model = ScalarAdvectionDiffusion(dimension=1, nu=0.01)
model.parameter_values = np.array([1.0, 0.01])
cards.description:
Scalar advection-diffusion (IMEX time integration).
$$\partial_t u + a \partial_x u = \nu \partial_{xx} u$$

cards.title: Create 1D
cards.template:
from zoomy_core.mesh import BaseMesh
mesh = BaseMesh.create_1d(domain=({x_min}, {x_max}), n_inner_cells={n_cells})

cards.title: Create 2D
cards.template:
from zoomy_core.mesh import BaseMesh
mesh = BaseMesh.create_2d(({x_min}, {x_max}, {y_min}, {y_max}), nx={nx}, ny={ny})

cards.title: Create 3D
cards.template:
from zoomy_core.mesh import BaseMesh
mesh = BaseMesh.create_3d(({x_min}, {x_max}, {y_min}, {y_max}, {z_min}, {z_max}), nx={nx}, ny={ny}, nz={nz})

cards.title: NumPy Solver (Pyodide)
cards.description: HyperbolicSolver via Pyodide — runs in the browser, always available.
cards.template:
# NumPy solver — runs locally via Pyodide
dt = 0.001
t_end = 1.0

cards.title: JAX Solver
cards.description: GPU-accelerated JAX solver via Docker backend.

cards.title: AMReX Solver
cards.description: Block-structured AMR solver via Docker backend.

cards.title: DMPlex Solver
cards.description: PETSc DMPlex unstructured solver via Docker backend.

cards.title: Empty Figure
cards.template:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
fig, ax = plt.subplots(1, 1, figsize=(6, 4))
ax.set_title('Empty View')
